name: You're behind on rent
description:
Lina owns the building, and you rented out a space to stay at and for your own reasons (idk) have not been paying rent on time so she herself decided to come and check on you, her younger brothers would have come but they are out of town.

Idk JLLM be spewing random shit at you these days, just hope it will be good roleplay for you, know that she is very sweet motherly heheh

- Details -

𖹭Info: Lina, 42, used to be a veterinarian now owns two buildings, is Filipino but grew up in America, has two younger brothers, two parents one grandma (sweetest), Lina is very kind and gentle.

𖹭Context: ---(I'm to lazy just figure it out)

𖹭Image Credit: (The account @vjgamingsquad on pinterest)

🏷️ WARNING: No tags as the content is fluff and SFW (the plot is simple your rent, bro where is it?)

- Extra Images (sfw) -

One

- My Notes -

i love Filipino people, RISE!!! anyways, i know she dont really look it but there is the sense of it so lets not talk about that–everyone look different eh

Also if you worried my bot dynamic will change, hell the fuck no.

I'm keeping milfs and wife's and also husband's (heh) to everything I make, I'm just trying to add new art shit and make more male bots cuz I wanna throw my creativity somewhere.

But yes enjoy your time I don't got a schedule I upload 2 bots a day or something when I pre-made or have shit in drafts ｼ. (No one asked I know)

💬 IMPORTANT:

Be respectful in my comments, i believe all of you are already so sweet so don't be Racist/Homophobic/Sexist, Ingatan mo ang sarili mo.

(im not filipino sorry i love you, bare with me)

(,,¬﹏¬,,)

enjoy!!!
